name: Pleper
highlight_text: Best for map search rank tracking
description:
What Pleper Does

Fairly basic tool, not super strong in the UI department but we like it for its efficiency and scrappiness. It’s also free to use with some usage limits and option for upgrade. The tool provides a simple, map-based local rank tracking solution specifically focused on monitoring Google Maps/Local Pack rankings around defined geographic areas. While basic in functionality, it allows visualizing how your business listing ranks across different proximity radii on Google Maps for specified keywords, mimicking localized user searches.

‍

Source: Pleper

Key Features

  • Plots ranking positions directly on a map interface
  • Identify ranking fluctuations based on proximity 
  • Intuitive visualization of localized performance
  • Focuses specifically on Google Maps/Local Pack results
  • Simulates searches from different geographic points
  • Distinct from monitoring web search rankings
  • Track rankings of your competitors' listings as well
  • Head-to-head local ranking intelligence  
  • Configure search keywords to monitor
  • Modify distance between tracked locations  
  • Adjust size of the geographic grid area
  • Generate a shareable URL with the results

Benefits of Pleper

  • Simple, map-centric local rank tracking interface
  • Accounts for proximity-based local ranking variances  
  • Customize search parameters to focused areas of interest
  • Share insights effortlessly with provided URLs and easily distribute findings to colleagues/clients

Pricing

$10 per month (for up to 5 local ranking credits)

Pros

✅Simple to use and affordable for small businesses/individuals

✅Isolates focus to critical Google Maps/Local Pack results

Cons

❌No monitoring of organic web search rankings

❌No side-by-side comparison or historical data for competitors

❌May not scale well for larger businesses/areas

❌Not suitable for Service Area Businesses

‍
